form.introHeadline: Hire Full-Time Virtual Medical Staff Through MedVirtual
form.introBody: MedVirtual helps medical and dental practices hire trained full-time virtual staff for calls, scheduling, intake, insurance, billing support, and admin workflows.
form.thankYouBody: A MedVirtual team member will follow up to discuss your practice's staffing needs.

creatives.headline: Medical Practice Owners
creatives.supportingLine: Add full-time virtual support without adding office space.

creatives.primaryTextBackup: Add trained virtual support to your practice team without adding more office space.
creatives.description: Support your practice team with trained virtual staff.
creatives.notes: Selected: clean medical scrub visual, no $10 price on image. Baked-in on-image copy does not match approved headline - designer must re-export 1080x1350 with approved copy + Book a Demo CTA. Source is 2965x2965 square.
creatives.dimensionsNote: Source images are 2965×2965 (1:1). Preview crops are padded 1080×1350. Designer must produce final 1080×1350 exports with approved on-image copy.
